title: Tempting Garlicky Japanese Pomegranate Okonomiyaki
description: A savory Japanese dish featuring pomegranate and garlic, cooked to a crispy perfection in a paella pan, this okonomiyaki is a delicious twist on traditional Japanese cuisine. It is egg-free and deep-fried to a golden brown.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shredded cabbage, pomegranate seeds, garlic, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and stir until the mixture forms a thick batter.
Pour the batter into the paella pan and cook for 5 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the okonomiyaki from the pan and flip it over.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Remove the okonomiyaki from the pan and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
